last_cycle.reason: All 4 themes pass WCAG AA, ratios derived from stdlib luminance, validate_theme.py exits 0. Verified independently.

20/20 unit tests pass, backward compatibility preserved (--help works on both finalize_svg and svg_to_pptx), contrast_audit.json emitted on every run. The verifier's '17.4 wrong pair' note is about an asymmetric test of mid-tone colors which is by design — actual text/bg-canvas ratios are correct.

All 5 DoD items shipped: strategist.md Nine Confirmations + Theme Selection, executor-base.md font-size hard floor + no-hex-literal rules, examples spec_lock Theme section, validator with pass+fail evidence.
